Large UK retailers are hurrying the government to close a tax loophole that they say is helping cheap, Chinese products enter the country.

Maddie Parker explains what a crackdown could mean for consumers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HSBC's Kettner: Stocks Don’t Need a Catalyst to Keep Rising
title_cn: 汇丰银行的凯特纳：股市不需要催化剂来持续上涨
summary:
Stocks can continue climbing without a specific catalyst, despite recent volatility, as structural factors support higher valuations, according to HSBC Chief multi-asset strategist Max Kettner. 

“I don’t think there needs to be a catalyst,” said Kettner. He explained that we’re in a world of structurally higher nominal growth, and structurally higher revenue growth, meaning if company margins don’t change then earnings will continue to rise.

Kettner joined Guy Johnson, Anna Edwards and Tom Mackenzie on "The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Adobe Inc. shares fell by the most in 15 months after the company said its chief financial officer would depart, leaving a leadership vacuum following Chief Executive Officer Shantanu Narayen  announced his resignation earlier this year.

summary: French startup Mistral AI is in talks to raise around €3 billion ($3.5 billion) at a valuation of roughly €20 billion, according to people familiar with the discussions, providing Europe’s artificial intelligence champion with a cash injection as it competes in a costly computing race against competitors in the US and China.

title: Taiwan Eyes $200 Million Data Center for Lone South America Ally
title_cn: 台湾斥资2亿美元为南美唯一盟友建立数据中心
summary: Taiwan plans to help bring a $200 million data center to Paraguay, its lone ally in South America, in a rare investment aimed at shoring up the two partners’ diplomatic relationship that’s backed by Washington.

title: SpaceX and Tesla Will Likely Merge, Ives Says
title_cn: 艾夫斯表示 SpaceX 和特斯拉可能会合并
summary: SpaceX has made history with the largest IPO ever, pricing shares at $135 each and raising $75 billion. Dan Ives, Global Head of Technology Research at Wedbush Securities, discussed the overwhelming demand for the offering, how this is a bet on Elon Musk and the possibility of Tesla and SpaceX merging. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Gets a $165 Price Target From New Street’s Ferragu

summary: Pierre Ferragu managing director at New Street Research, discusses the record-breaking SpaceX IPO, his growth and capex expectations for the company moving forward, and the “Musk premium” factored into its valuation.  (Corrects spelling of analyst’s firm in headline.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Swiss Economy Depends on Foreign Workers: Economiesuisse
title_cn: 瑞士经济依赖外国工人：Economiesuisse
summary: If Switzerland votes to cap the population at 10 million inhabitants, this could severely impact labor-intensive sectors like restaurants, construction, and healthcare, as well as innovative sectors like scientific research and product development, all of which depend 'heavily' on foreign workers, says Rudolf Minsch, Chief Economist at Swiss business sector umbrella organization Economiesuisse. He spoke on 'The Pulse with Francine Lacqua' on Bloomberg TV. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: London's AI Boom | Bloomberg Tech: Europe 6/12/2026
title_cn: 伦敦的人工智能热潮 |彭博科技：欧洲 2026 年 6 月 12 日
summary:
In this episode of Bloomberg Tech: Europe, Bloomberg’s Tom Mackenzie dives into London's AI boom. The UK capital is on a tear, with Britain leading the AI wave in Europe, so what's behind the explosive growth and how did London become a global center for artificial intelligence? Bloomberg speaks to key players, including the co-Founder of ElevenLabs - the UK's most valuable AI start-up.

"Bloomberg Tech: Europe" spotlights the biggest names and trends shaping the region's technology ecosystem as the global competition heats up. This monthly, 30-minute magazine-style show features in-depth interviews with top technology leaders, as well as major investors and policymakers - giving you a compelling A to Z of the most consequential innovations, opportunities and challenges.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Shows Willingness to Finance AI, Waldron Says
title_cn: 沃尔德伦表示 SpaceX IPO 显示了为人工智能融资的意愿
summary: John Waldron, Goldman Sachs president and chief operating officer discusses SpaceX's record IPO and whether markets can absorb two other possible big IPOs by the end of the year. "Capital markets are demonstrating a willingness to finance these extraordinary companies as we build out this AI infrastructure," he tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman’s Waldron Says SpaceX Shows Investor Zeal for Funding AI
title_cn: 高盛的 Waldron 表示 SpaceX 显示了投资者对资助人工智能的热情

title: Tech Secretary Vows More Help for UK AI Sector
title_cn: 技术大臣誓言为英国人工智能行业提供更多帮助
summary: Technology Secretary Liz Kendall says the UK’s Labour government will strengthen efforts to drive institutional funds into British tech companies, as she pledged more backing for the country’s artificial intelligence sector. Speaking to Bloomberg TV during London Tech Week, Kendall said she wants The government wants to unlock investment into UK firms with legal reforms to how pension funds are run. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Needs More Affordable Power Plants To Drive AI: Miller
title_cn: 英国需要更经济实惠的发电厂来推动人工智能：米勒
summary:
Evantic Capital Founder and Managing Partner Matt Miller says the UK needs to invest in more affordable power plants, including nuclear energy, to boost the the country's AI sector.
Miller is a former partner at Sequoia Capital who last year founded Evantic, a 400 million dollar UK-based venture capital fund. Miller spoke to Tom Mackenzie on Bloomberg Tech: Europe. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Shares Indicated More Than 35% Higher on Gray Markets
title_cn: 灰色市场上 SpaceX 股价上涨逾 35%

summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google filed a lawsuit against a suspected Chinese cybercrime operation, alleging that the group used artificial intelligence to send more than 2 million text messages with fraudulent links attempting to scam cellphone users.

summary: A conversation with HayWire's Aiden Johnson.

title: Odd Lots: Making the Hay Market More Transparent (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的地段：让干草市场更加透明（播客）
summary: The hay market is not a transparent market: It is very fractured by types of hay, whether it is alfalfa or clover hay. There are a few opaque, illiquid markets like this — scrap metal for instance — that require some hands-on investigating to figure out. Aiden Johnson is co-founder and CEO of the HayWire newsletter, which aims to make the hay market more transparent: He and co-founder Cole Glasgow use an AI model to mine public data sources — like USDA reports on auction prices across different

title: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Executives Plan to Attend G7 Summit
title_cn: Anthropic、OpenAI、谷歌高管计划出席 G7 峰会
summary: Artificial intelligence executives from Anthropic PBC, OpenAI and Alphabet Inc.’s Google are slated to attend the Group of Seven summit, a gathering of world leaders that gets underway next week in France.

title: UK Tech Secretary Vows More Action on Pushing Funds to Startups
title_cn: 英国科技大臣誓言采取更多行动向初创企业提供资金
summary: The UK’s Labour government will strengthen efforts to drive institutional funds into British tech companies, Technology Secretary Liz Kendall said, as she pledged more backing for the country’s artificial intelligence sector.

title: US Ships Escort Oil Tankers Through Hormuz at Night, Burgum Says
title_cn: 布尔古姆称，美国船只夜间护送油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡
summary: US forces are helping move millions of barrels through the Strait of Hormuz under the cover of darkness, sometimes escorting more than 20 ships per night out of the vital waterway, US Interior Secretary Doug Burgum said Friday.

title: Starmer Vows to Fight On After Defense Chief’s Resignation
title_cn: 斯塔默誓言在国防部长辞职后继续战斗
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer pledged not to step down over a dispute with of his former defense chief, signaling that he would try to hold onto the job through a key election next week.

title: Chile Seeks Venezuela Diplomatic Reset to Advance Migration Plans
title_cn: 智利寻求委内瑞拉外交重置以推进移民计划
summary: Chile’s foreign affairs minister is eager to resume full diplomatic relations with Venezuela before the government’s term ends in 2030 to facilitate the return of tens of thousands of undocumented immigrants. The ball is now in Venezuela’s court, he said.

title: UK Defense Chief Warns of ‘Challenges’ Amid Spending Fight
title_cn: 英国国防部长警告支出斗争中的“挑战”
summary: The UK’s new defense secretary, Dan Jarvis, warned industry and military leaders there are “significant challenges ahead” a day after his predecessor quit in a clash with the Treasury over spending.

title: Musk, Trump Relationship More Professional | The Debrief
title_cn: 马斯克与特朗普关系更专业 |汇报
summary: On this week’s "The Debrief with Mario Parker," Mario breaks down how the relationship between President Donald Trump and Elon Musk has evolved. Earlier this month Trump said Musk is “a friend of mine again.” Mario also talks about how some members of the Trump administration stand to gain financially from the SpaceX IPO. He reports on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Merz’s Healthcare Overhaul Faces Resistance in German States
title_cn: 梅尔茨的医疗改革在德国各州面临阻力
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s landmark overhaul of Germany’s healthcare system, a central element of a broader package of promised reforms, is facing resistance by state governments over planned service cuts.

title: IMF Said to Agree on Kyiv Loan Deal Despite Missed Condition
title_cn: 尽管未能达成条件，国际货币基金组织仍同意基辅贷款协议
summary: The International Monetary Fund agreed to release its next tranche of a loan to Ukraine, despite Kyiv’s failure to meet a key condition as the war-weary nation faces a growing backlash against the requirements.

title: Morocco Weighs China Free-Trade Agreement, Minister Says
title_cn: 部长表示摩洛哥正在考虑与中国自由贸易协定
summary: China asked Morocco to sign a free trade agreement, the North African nation’s industry minister said, as Rabat weighs whether closer economic ties with Beijing would benefit its export-oriented manufacturing sector.

title: India Summons US Diplomat for Second Time Over Gulf Strikes
title_cn: 印度因海湾袭击第二次传唤美国外交官
summary: India’s government summoned a senior US diplomat for a second time this week to protest US strikes on vessels carrying Indian crew members in the Gulf of Oman.

title: India Shifts Into Crisis Mode With Fuel Curbs, Wider Deficit
title_cn: 印度因燃料限制和赤字扩大而进入危机模式
summary: India is ramping up its economic defenses as the war in Iran drives up energy costs, prompting authorities to ration diesel, weigh spending cuts and hunt for overseas capital.

title: Africa CDC Says Congo Ebola Outbreak’s True Scale Unknown
title_cn: 非洲疾病预防控制中心称刚果埃博拉疫情的真实规模未知
summary: Africa CDC says authorities are unable to determine the true extent of the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo because emergency workers can’t find all the missing contacts of patients infected by the virus.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Flexes Status as Major Cultural Force
title_cn: 特朗普改变了主要文化力量的地位
summary: The president is everywhere, all the time like few chief executives before him

title: US, Iran Edge Toward Interim Deal Signing Close to G7 Next Week
title_cn: 美国和伊朗有望在下周七国集团峰会前夕签署临时协议
summary: The US and Iran may sign an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz on the sidelines of the Group of Seven world leaders summit next week, according to senior officials.

title: Trump, Modi Look to Repair Ties in Shadow of New US Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普和莫迪希望在美国新一轮打击的阴影下修复关系
summary: A possible meeting next week between Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump offers a chance to reset ties following a year of strained relations over tariffs, Pakistan, and now, the Iran war.

title: NATO Winding Down Its Kosovo Mission Due to Improved Security
title_cn: 由于安全局势改善，北约结束了在科索沃的任务
summary: NATO will reduce its military presence in Kosovo, marking a shift for a peacekeeping mission that has remained a cornerstone of stability in the Balkans since the 1999 war.

title: Sweden Says Russia Could Seek to Test NATO in ‘Near Term’
title_cn: 瑞典称俄罗斯可能寻求在“近期”测试北约
summary: Sweden sees a possibility that Russia may seek to test NATO’s cohesion and its commitment to mutual defense through some kind of military attack in the “relatively near term.”

title: US and Iran Nearing a Peace Deal Around Next Week’s G7 Meeting
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在下周七国集团会议期间接近达成和平协议
summary: The US and Iran are moving closer to signing an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz that could potentially come as soon as Sunday with the Group of Seven world leaders set to meet next week. Abeer Abu Omar reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Treasury Says Upgrades Show Path to Investment Grade
title_cn: 南非财政部表示升级表明了投资级别的道路
summary: South Africa’s recent credit-rating upgrades are a strong endorsement of government policy and show the nation can restore its coveted investment-grade status if it stays on track, said the National Treasury chief.

title: Swiss Firms Expect Population Cap to Be Defanged, Lobby Says
title_cn: 游说团体称瑞士企业预计人口上限将被取消
summary: Swiss companies expect the government to water down the proposed population cap if voters back it, according to the country’s main business lobby.

title: Trump’s UFC Bash Risks Alienating Voters
title_cn: 特朗普对UFC的猛烈抨击可能会疏远选民
summary: The president’s obsession with pet projects fuels arguments he lacks focus on pocketbook issues.

title: China Confirms Arrest of American Citizen on Spying Charges
title_cn: 中国证实以间谍罪逮捕一名美国公民
summary: Beijing confirmed the arrest of a US citizen on spy allegations, a move that may test a trade truce upheld at a recent summit between President Donald Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

title: UK Defense Secretary’s Ugly Exit Shatters Starmer’s Legacy
title_cn: 英国防长丑陋的退出粉碎了斯塔默的遗产
summary: In a rousing speech in Munich in February, Keir Starmer vowed to “spend more, faster” to counter the threat from Russia. Four months later, his defense secretary quit over the embattled UK premier’s failure to follow through, destroying his best shot at a lasting legacy.

title: Trump Says Iran Deal in 'Coming Days' & SpaceX IPO Breaks Records | Daybreak Europe 6/12/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗协议将在“未来几天”达成且 SpaceX 首次公开募股将打破纪录黎明欧洲 6/12/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, Brent crude fell below $90 a barrel after President Trump said a deal to end the war in Iran could be signed as soon as this weekend. The president said he had pulled back plans for a third day of military strikes on Iran, after the Supreme Leader agreed to a deal. But Iran's semi-official Fars news agency says nothing has been approved yet.

And SpaceX has made history with its $75 billion IPO, with a market value of $1.7 trillion ahead of its first day of trading.

Today's guest: Anders Schelde, AkademikerPension, CIO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan’s Stocks Rise as Trump’s Iran Deal Comments Lift Sentiment
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗协议评论提振市场情绪，日本股市上涨
summary: Japanese equities rallied after US President Donald Trump signaled the US is close to signing a deal with Iran, fueling expectations that the Middle East conflict is nearing an end.

title: What to Know as the Swiss Prepare to Vote on a 10 Million Population Cap
title_cn: 瑞士准备就 1000 万人口上限进行投票时需要了解什么
summary: The growing prominence of far-right political parties in Europe is pressuring governments to introduce stricter controls on immigration. Switzerland is set to vote on a proposal that would take things to the next level: a 10 million cap on its population.

title: Russians Told There’s Enough Gasoline as Drone War Hits Supply
title_cn: 无人机战争影响供应，俄罗斯人告诉他们有足够的汽油
summary: Russia’s regional authorities are scrambling to dispel concerns about a gasoline crunch in the wake of Ukrainian strikes on oil infrastructure that sparked reports of shortages at some filling stations.

title: Gary Lineker: The World Cup, Trump and FIFA
title_cn: 加里·莱因克尔：世界杯、特朗普和国际足联
summary: For decades, Gary Lineker anchored live sporting events for the BBC. Now he’s a podcaster. In this conversation, he talks about his new Netflix show and his hopes for an England World Cup win. (Source: Bloomberg)
